title: jonesiopsis roei
side_effects: Jonesiopsis roei can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, or even anaphylaxis in severe cases. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of the plant may also result in interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions. In extreme cases, Jonesiopsis roei poisoning can cause cardiac arrest, respiratory failure, and even death.
